text_original:
The wolf springs forward on his dewlap,
Or trips back on his tail.
The duke was humble, and greatly admirable,
Self-composed in his red slippers.
text_normalized:
The wolf springs forward on his dewlap,
Or trips back on his tail.
The duke was humble, and greatly admirable,
Self-composed in his red slippers.

text_original:
The wolf springs forward on his dewlap,
Or trips back on his tail.
The duke was humble, and greatly admirable;
There is no flaw in his virtuous fame.
text_normalized:
The wolf springs forward on his dewlap,
Or trips back on his tail.
The duke was humble, and greatly admirable;
There is no flaw in his virtuous fame.
